facebook.content: It's time to come together in worship! Join us on the First Saturday of every month at 12 Noon at our Southfield campus (24301 Telegraph) for powerful worship and connection with our community. Or, join us daily online at 8:15 AM Monday through Friday for the Hour of Power on Facebook Live. Whether you're seeking refreshment, guidance, or a sense of belonging - we welcome you. Tag someone who needs this reminder, and let's lift our voices together!
facebook.fullPost:
